day1_lunch_start.name: Me
day1_lunch_start.text: *Lunchtime. I'm starving. I don't even know where the cafeteria is.*

day1_lunch_choice.name: Me
choices: Sea said to eat together, so stay in the classroom
My head's been hurting... maybe visit the nurse's office

day1_lunch_sea.name: Han Sea
day1_lunch_sea.text: "Over here! I saved you a spot."

day1_lunch_sea_2.name: Me
day1_lunch_sea_2.text: *Sea opens her lunchbox. That's a lot of food.*

day1_lunch_sea_3.name: Han Sea
day1_lunch_sea_3.text: "I packed a bit too much, so let's share. Hope it's to your taste."

day1_lunch_sea_4.name: Me
day1_lunch_sea_4.text: *Braised mackerel, rolled omelet, spinach. Tastes like a proper home-cooked meal.*

day1_lunch_sea_6.name: Me
day1_lunch_sea_6.text: "This is really delicious. Did you make it yourself?"

day1_lunch_sea_7.name: Han Sea
day1_lunch_sea_7.text: "...Yeah. I got up at dawn to make it."

day1_lunch_sea_8.name: Me
day1_lunch_sea_8.text: *Sea's earlobes have turned slightly red. The type who can't handle compliments.*

day1_lunch_sea_9.name: Me
day1_lunch_sea_9.text: "Hey, you've got a grain of rice stuck here."

day1_lunch_sea_11.name: Me
day1_lunch_sea_11.text: *Sea frantically rubs her cheek. So much for the class president's dignity — her face is beet red.*

day1_lunch_sea_12.name: Han Sea
day1_lunch_sea_12.text: "...Don't laugh. Tomorrow I'll eat more prettily."

day1_lunch_sea_13.name: Han Sea
day1_lunch_sea_13.text: "I remember everything about {name}. Your favorite side dishes, which period you dozed off in today."

day1_lunch_sea_14.name: Me
day1_lunch_sea_14.text: *No one's ever paid that much attention to me before. It's a little embarrassing. She's a good friend.*

day1_lunch_yuna_start.name: Me
day1_lunch_yuna_start.text: *I step into the library. It's almost empty since it's lunch.*

day1_lunch_yuna_1.name: Me
day1_lunch_yuna_1.text: *Walking between the bookshelves, I hear a 'click' from the corner.*

day1_lunch_yuna_3.name: Me
day1_lunch_yuna_3.text: *A girl holding a camera is looking at me with a startled expression.*

day1_lunch_yuna_5.name: Choi Yuna
day1_lunch_yuna_5.text: "Yes! I was taking pictures of the library and you just appeared out of nowhere... Sorry! I'm Choi Yuna, first-year. You're the transfer student, right?"

day1_lunch_yuna_6.name: Me
day1_lunch_yuna_6.text: *She gives a bright smile. What a cute underclassman.*

day1_lunch_yuna_8.name: Me
day1_lunch_yuna_8.text: *Yuna suddenly raises her camera toward the window and snaps a photo. Click.*

day1_lunch_yuna_9.name: Choi Yuna
day1_lunch_yuna_9.text: "Look, the light coming in behind you was so pretty... Oh, your face isn't in it! It's just the scenery!"

day1_lunch_yuna_10.name: Me
day1_lunch_yuna_10.text: *She's flustered, making excuses, but my silhouette is clearly visible on the camera screen. ...This underclassman is bolder than I thought.*

day1_lunch_nurse_start.name: Me
day1_lunch_nurse_start.text: *I open the nurse's office door. Smells like disinfectant.*

day1_lunch_riin_1.name: Kang Riin
day1_lunch_riin_1.text: "Oh my, the nurse's office on your first day? Are you feeling okay?"

day1_lunch_riin_2.name: Me
day1_lunch_riin_2.text: "I've got a headache. Do you have anything for it?"

day1_lunch_riin_3.name: Kang Riin
day1_lunch_riin_3.text: "Sit down for a sec. Let me do a quick check. ...Hmm, you seem healthy. That's good."

day1_lunch_riin_4.name: Me
day1_lunch_riin_4.text: *She did a quick checkup. The nurse's office is clean and quiet.*

day1_lunch_riin_5.name: Kang Riin
day1_lunch_riin_5.text: "Here's some medicine. If you're tired, feel free to rest here for a bit."

day1_lunch_riin_6.name: Kang Riin
day1_lunch_riin_6.text: "Health is the most important thing. I'll take good care of {name}."

day1_lunch_riin_7.name: Me
day1_lunch_riin_7.text: *Somehow that's reassuring. It's nice having a school nurse like her around.*

day1_lunch_alone_2.name: Me
day1_lunch_alone_2.text: *Eating my lunch while looking down at the schoolyard. Peaceful.*

day1_lunch_end.name: Me
day1_lunch_end.text: *Lunch is over. Time for afternoon classes.*
